property.name: zeppelin.server.addr
property.description: Server binding address — 0.0.0.0 pour Docker

property.name: zeppelin.server.port
property.description: Server port.

property.name: zeppelin.server.ssl.port
property.description: Server ssl port. (used when ssl property is set to true)

property.name: zeppelin.server.context.path
property.description: Context Path of the Web Application

property.name: zeppelin.war.tempdir
property.description: Location of jetty temporary directory (chemin absolu pour Docker)

property.name: zeppelin.notebook.dir
property.description: path or URI for notebook persist

property.name: zeppelin.notebook.homescreen.hide
property.description: hide homescreen notebook from list when this value set to true

property.name: zeppelin.notebook.collaborative.mode.enable
property.description: Enable collaborative mode

property.name: zeppelin.notebook.storage
property.description: versioned notebook persistence layer implementation

property.name: zeppelin.notebook.one.way.sync
property.description: If there are multiple notebook storages, should we treat the first one as the only source of truth?

property.name: zeppelin.notebook.public
property.description: Make notebook public by default when created, private otherwise

property.name: zeppelin.interpreter.dir
property.description: Interpreter implementation base directory

property.name: zeppelin.interpreter.localRepo
property.description: Local repository for interpreter's additional dependency loading

property.name: zeppelin.interpreter.dep.mvnRepo
property.description: Remote principal repository for interpreter's additional dependency loading

property.name: zeppelin.interpreter.connect.timeout
property.description: Interpreter process connect timeout in msec.

property.name: zeppelin.interpreter.output.limit
property.description: Output message from interpreter exceeding the limit will be truncated

property.name: zeppelin.dep.localrepo
property.description: Local repository for dependency loader

property.name: zeppelin.ssl
property.description: Should SSL be used by the servers?

property.name: zeppelin.ssl.client.auth
property.description: Should client authentication be used for SSL connections?

property.name: zeppelin.server.allowed.origins
property.description: Allowed sources for REST and WebSocket requests

property.name: zeppelin.websocket.max.text.message.size
property.description: Size in characters of the maximum text message to be received by websocket.

property.name: zeppelin.server.xframe.options
property.description: X-Frame-Options HTTP response header

property.name: zeppelin.server.xxss.protection
property.description: HTTP X-XSS-Protection response header

property.name: zeppelin.server.xcontent.type.options
property.description: HTTP X-Content-Type-Options response header

property.name: zeppelin.run.mode
property.description: auto|local|k8s|docker — forcé en local pour ce cluster

property.name: zeppelin.search.use.disk
property.description: Whether using disk for storing search index

property.name: zeppelin.search.index.path
property.description: path for storing search index on disk.

property.name: zeppelin.search.index.rebuild
property.description: Whether rebuild index when zeppelin start.

property.name: zeppelin.jobmanager.enable
property.description: Disable job manager tab to save memory

property.name: zeppelin.spark.only_yarn_cluster
property.description: Whether only allow yarn cluster mode
